World.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
World.desc: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

World.title: Epstein housed abuse victims in London flats, BBC reveals
World.desc: The revelations intensify concerns about repeated police decisions not to investigate 2015 trafficking claims.

World.title: Kenyan leader sparks uproar after  mocking Nigerians' spoken English
World.desc: William Ruto says Kenyans speak "some of the best English in the world" while it is hard to understand Nigerians.

World.title: Woman trapped in poo for three hours after outback toilet collapses
World.desc: The woman got stuck waist-deep in a pit latrine in the Australian outback after it gave way.

World.title: South Korea police arrest man for posting AI photo of runaway wolf
World.desc: The widely circulated image had prompted authorities to move their search operation.

World.title: Ringo Starr: 'I made all my mistakes on stage'
World.desc: Beatles star reveals all about his new country album, being a Sir and coming up with the phrase A Hard Day's Night.

Technology.title: Meta to cut one in 10 jobs after spending billions on AI
Technology.desc: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

Technology.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
Technology.desc: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.

Technology.title: From scientist to silk farmer: India's silk industry renewal
Technology.desc: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.

Technology.title: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
Technology.desc: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.

Technology.title: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
Technology.desc: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.

Technology.title: Anthropic investigating claim of unauthorised access to Mythos AI tool
Technology.desc: The AI company has said the model is too dangerous to release publicly because of its hacking capabilities.

Science.title: First ever talks to ditch fossil fuels as UN deadlock deepens
Science.desc: Some 60 countries are meeting in Colombia as frustration grows with lack of progress in tackling climate change

Science.title: Meet the 19-metre octopus that prowled the ancient seas
Science.desc: Giant octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago, according to fossil evidence.

Science.title: Ban 'forever chemicals' in uniforms and frying pans, MPs urge
Science.desc: School uniforms and non-stick pans are some of the everyday products that should stop using chemicals called PFAS, MPs say.

Science.title: Electricity bills targeted in planned shakeup to energy pricing
Science.desc: The war in the Middle East has brought renewed attention to Britain's vulnerability to energy price shocks.

Science.title: Artemis II crew: 'We left as friends - we came back as best friends'
Science.desc: The four crew members gave their first press conference since they splashed down nearly a week ago, and emphasised hope and unity.

Science.title: Butterfly numbers are dropping but here are five species you may see more of
Science.desc: A warming climate has helped some to flourish, researchers say, but the outlook is troubling.
